items.headline: Google $40B Anthropic investment with 5GW Google Cloud capacity over 5 years (Apr 24, Bloomberg)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Google $40B Anthropic investment with 5GW Google Cloud capacity over 5 years (Apr 24, Bloomberg)** — Previous report ended at Amazon $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity for Anthropic and the Apr 22 Google × Thinking Machines Lab GB300 deal. Now a **second hyperscaler-Anthropic anchor lands**: Google commits $10B cash at $350B valuation + up to $30B milestone-tied + **5GW of Google Cloud compute over 5 years**. The "Hyperscaler-AI-lab cap-table coupling" thesis is now Big-3-confirmed.

items.headline: DeepSeek V4 9.5x-13.7x memory cut + Huawei Ascend hardware-specific tuning (Bloomberg-CCTV Apr 26)
items.diff_narrative: **New: DeepSeek V4 9.5x-13.7x memory cut + Huawei Ascend hardware-specific tuning (Bloomberg-CCTV Apr 26)** — Previous report covered V4 launch, Huawei integration framing, and benchmarks. Now the **Apr 26 Bloomberg-via-CCTV social-account piece** ties **DeepSeek's V4 timeline shift directly to Ascend NPU optimization**, alongside the gHacks deep-dive on **Hybrid Attention's 9.5x-13.7x memory reduction vs V3.2**.

items.headline: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE via GGUF chat_template Jinja2 SSTI, public PoC + CERT/CC VU#915947
items.diff_narrative: **New: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE via GGUF chat_template Jinja2 SSTI, public PoC + CERT/CC VU#915947** — Previous report covered SGLang CVE-2026-5760 only as "advisory continues." Now a **public PoC at `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE` is in circulation**, CERT/CC VU#915947 issued, and SGLang joins LMDeploy as **the second weaponized AI-inference primitive in two weeks**.

items.headline: OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (Apr 26, beta.3-7+)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (Apr 26, beta.3-7+) — voice reply / TTS upgrades, 6 new TTS providers (Azure Speech / Xiaomi / Local CLI / Inworld / Volcengine / ElevenLabs v3)** — Previous report covered OpenClaw v2026.4.23 (Apr 24 tag). Now **v2026.4.25-beta beta.3 (13:00 Apr 26) → beta.4 (13:24 Apr 26) → beta.7+** ships in a single afternoon — release tempo is sub-24h under continuous voice-stack hardening. Voice reply moves from "available" to "production-shaped."

items.headline: Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 dense coding model (Apr 22 launch, traction Apr 23-26)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 dense coding model (Apr 22 launch, traction Apr 23-26)** — Previous report's Chinese-LLM landscape mention covered "Qwen 3.5 / Kimi K2.6 / GLM-5 / MiniMax M2.7 / Tencent Hunyuan 3.0" but **did not name Qwen3.6-27B**. Now official Qwen blog + MarkTechPost + buildfastwithai confirm **dense 27B beats 397B-A17B MoE on SWE-bench Verified (77.2% vs 76.2%) at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090 Q4_K_M (~16.8 GB)**, plus a **new Thinking Preservation mechanism** — a "consumer-GPU coding agent" baseline emerges.

items.headline: Pillar Security
items.diff_narrative: **New: Pillar Security — Antigravity prompt-injection sandbox escape via `find_by_name -X` (Google patched, bug bounty paid)** — Previous report referenced agentic-CI prompt injection at Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot but **did not include Antigravity**. Now Pillar's research disclosure shows **the `find_by_name` Pattern parameter inserts the `-X` (exec-batch) flag into `fd`, achieving RCE despite Antigravity's Secure Mode** — a third agentic-CI vendor confirmed vulnerable to comment-style prompt injection class.

items.headline: Microsoft ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 (CVSS 9.1)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Microsoft ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 (CVSS 9.1) — out-of-band emergency patch, cookie-forging SYSTEM-privilege flaw** — Not in previous report. Now **Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection 10.0.7 OOB update** fixes a privilege-escalation flaw in HMAC validation; widely deployed `.NET 10` web apps are exposed.

items.headline: Anthropic engineering postmortem on Apr 23 Claude Code regression
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic engineering postmortem on Apr 23 Claude Code regression — March 4 reasoning cut + April 16 verbosity-prompt issue, fixed Apr 20 in v2.1.116** — Previous report covered the v2.1.116 quality recovery and v2.1.117 follow-on. Now **Anthropic's official postmortem at anthropic.com/engineering/april-23-postmortem** is in circulation, framing **two distinct weeks-long quality regressions in Claude Code + Agent SDK + Cowork** that fooled users into blaming themselves.

items.headline: Claude Code v2.1.119 / v2.1.120 24-hour regression cluster (Apr 24-25)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Claude Code v2.1.119 / v2.1.120 24-hour regression cluster (Apr 24-25)** — Previous report ended at v2.1.117 (Apr 25). Now v2.1.118 / v2.1.119 / v2.1.120 ship **8 regressions in 24 hours**: retract-grade auto-update break, silent model swap, two resume-time crashes, UI-duplication bug, WSL2-only `/mcp` freeze, CLAUDE.md-is-ignored regression, broken `sandbox.excludedCommands` promise, macOS worktree hang. Survival checklist points users back to v2.1.117 rollback.

items.headline: Indirect prompt injection in the wild
items.diff_narrative: **New: Indirect prompt injection in the wild — Google Online Security Blog + Help Net Security Apr 24, 32% YoY rise Nov 2025-Feb 2026** — Previous report covered the Comment-and-Control GitHub-comment attack as a single disclosure event. Now **Google's primary research piece** quantifies **a 32% increase in malicious prompt-injection content** crawled across the open web, with **10 confirmed in-the-wild IPI attacks**, generalizing the threat from "GitHub comments" to **"the open web."**

items.headline: Ollama MLX backend Apr 23 deep-dive (gingter.org)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Ollama MLX backend Apr 23 deep-dive (gingter.org) — Foundry Local stays Metal-only, MLX gap widens** — Previous report covered Ollama v0.21.2 (Apr 24) and Foundry Local "no major announcement." Now **Apr 23's gingter.org piece** quantifies the gap: **Ollama on M5 Max sees 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on Qwen3.5-35B-A3B with NVFP4**, while Foundry Local's MLX support remains an open issue (`microsoft/Foundry-Local#329`).

items.headline: llama.cpp build b8937 (Apr 26 09:28 UTC), b8936 (Apr 26 08:54 UTC)
items.diff_narrative: **New: llama.cpp build b8937 (Apr 26 09:28 UTC), b8936 (Apr 26 08:54 UTC) — sub-1h cadence** — Previous report stated "no new release tag inside Apr 22-25." Now **two builds land on Apr 26 within a single hour**, breaking the "no-window-release" pattern.

items.headline: NVIDIA $5T market cap retake + AMD +13.9% + Nasdaq / S&P 500 records (Apr 24)
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: NVIDIA $5T market cap retake + AMD +13.9% + Nasdaq / S&P 500 records (Apr 24)** — Carry-forward from previous report. Intel Q1 2026 beat (EPS $0.29 vs $0.01, revenue $13.6B +7% YoY, +24% close on Apr 24 — best single-day move since 1987) is now consolidated as the catalyst, with iShares Semiconductor ETF +40.4% MTD through Apr 24.
